zh.lifeSummary: 當Amitia l'Arcedekne於1259年出生在英國可瓦爾薩爾塔申時，她的父親Thomas L' Arcedekne35歲，母親Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth29歲。她和Sir Michael Petit至少有2個兒子。她去世於1313年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾費爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amitia l'Arcedekne于1259年出生在英国可瓦爾薩爾塔申时，她的父亲Thomas L' Arcedekne35岁，母亲Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth29岁。她和Sir Michael Petit至少有2个儿子。她去世于1313年在英国英格兰可瓦爾費爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Amitia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a modern creation, an altered form of Amity . In form it coincides with Latin amita ‘maternal aunt’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Amitia l'Arcedekne was born in 1259, in Saltash, Cornwall, England, her father, Thomas L' Arcedekne, was 35 and her mother, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, was 29. She had at least 2 sons with Sir Michael Petit. She died in 1313, in Philleigh, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amitia l'Arcedekne est née en 1259, à Saltash, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Thomas L' Arcedekne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Sir Michael Petit. Elle est décédée en 1313, à Philleigh, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amitia l'Arcedekne 1259 in Saltash, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas L' Arcedekne 35 und ihre Mutter Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth 29. Sie hatte mit Sir Michael Petit mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1313 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Philleigh, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amitia l'Arcedekne è nata il nel 1259 nel Saltash, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Thomas L' Arcedekne, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Sir Michael Petit. Morì nel 1313, nel Philleigh, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amitia l'Arcedekneが1259年にイギリスコルンワルサルタッシュで生まれた時，父Thomas L' Arcedekneは35歳，母Alice FitzRoger de Warkworthは29歳であった。彼女はSir Michael Petitとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1313年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルフィレイグで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amitia l'Arcedekne(이)가 1259년 영국 코른월 살타시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas L' Arcedekne(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir Michael Petit(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 필리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amitia l'Arcedekne nasceu em 1259, em Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas L' Arcedekne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Sir Michael Petit. Ela faleceu em 1313, em Philleigh, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amitia l'Arcedekne родилась в 1259 г. в местности салташ, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas L' Arcedekne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Sir Michael Petit. Она умерла в 1313 г. в местности филлиг, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amitia l'Arcedekne nació en 1259, en Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas L' Arcedekne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Sir Michael Petit. Murió en 1313, en Philleigh, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
